result.title: Robin Barnes & Matthew Berman - Summertime / Smooth (The Porch Chronicles)
result.description: New Orleans Jazz Vocalist Robin Barnes and Guitar / Songwriter Matthew Berman perform a medley of "Summertime" and "Smooth" from a NOLA porch.

result.title: Sazerac - Antoine's Cocktail
result.description:
http://www.getwithember.com Marvin Allen of The Carousel Bar (Hotel Monteleone) shows Jana Ritter of Sazerac company how to make a "Kentucky Morning Fizz".

Directed / Filmed / Edited: Matthew Berman
Starring: Marvin Allen & Jana Ritter
Produced: Tom Martin
Music: Matthew Berman

result.title: Sazerac - "Kentucky Morning Fizz"
result.description:
http://www.getwithember.com Marvin Allen of The Carousel Bar (Hotel Monteleone) shows Jana Ritter of Sazerac company how to make a "Kentucky Morning Fizz".

Directed / Filmed / Edited: Matthew Berman
Starring: Marvin Allen & Jana Ritter
Produced: Tom Martin
Music: Matthew Berman

Ingredients:
1 oz. Lemon Juice
¼ oz. Sugar
1 Fresh Egg White
½ oz. Herbsaint
1 ½ oz. Rye
3--4 Dashes of Peychaud's Bitters
2 oz. Club Soda

result.title: Matt Berman on tour with Carnival of Madness, Firefly Vodka, and Backstage Artist Lounge
result.description: http://www.themattberman.com Matt Berman heads on tour with Carnival of Madness, Firefly Vodka, and Backstage Artist Lounge. Matt, acting as Firefly brand ambassador, offers brand level support to the great state of Maine.
